commands.summary: TypeScript strict mode: zero errors across full repo including all lib/kudos and components/kudos files
ESLint: zero errors/warnings across app/, components/, lib/ (kudos feature scope)
31/31 unit tests pass (lib/kudos/validation.test.ts, lib/kudos/use-kudos-form.test.ts), correctly scoped after round-1 fix
Production compile succeeds; /kudos route compiled and registered alongside existing routes

commands.command: supabase db reset (apply 5 kudos migrations to local Postgres)
commands.summary: All 5 migrations (profiles, hashtags, kudos+children, create_kudos RPC, storage bucket) applied cleanly with zero errors

commands.command: assert: kudos insert with is_anonymous=true + non-null sender_id is rejected by DB
commands.summary: Assertion confirmed: psql raised kudos_anonymous_sender_check violation as expected (raw psql exit 1 is the correct negative-path result; this exitCode reflects the assertion itself passing)

commands.command: assert: kudos insert with is_anonymous=false + null sender_id is rejected by DB
commands.summary: Assertion confirmed: psql raised kudos_anonymous_sender_check violation as expected (raw psql exit 1 is the correct negative-path result; this exitCode reflects the assertion itself passing)

commands.command: assert: create_kudos(...) with 0 and with 6 hashtag_ids is rejected, no partial row left
commands.summary: Assertion confirmed: RPC raised in both cases and kudos row count was 0 afterward (transaction rolled back, no partial write)

commands.command: assert: create_kudos(...) with an invalid/inactive hashtag_id is rejected
commands.summary: Assertion confirmed: RPC raised "one or more hashtag_ids are invalid or inactive" as designed

commands.command: psql: create_kudos(...) happy path with simulated auth.uid() session, 2 valid hashtags
commands.summary: Kudos row created with correct sender_id (from auth.uid(), not client input), recipient_id, and 2 kudos_hashtags join rows

commands.command: psql: SELECT on profiles/hashtags as authenticated role (post round-1 GRANT fix)
commands.summary: Confirmed real bug fixed: base GRANT SELECT was missing on all 6 new tables (RLS alone does not expose tables to the Data API role in this Supabase version); added and re-verified
